slice: Phase 4 versioned API, scoped OAuth and signed idempotent webhooks

verifiedControls: OAuth client name and exact scope selection

negativeCoverage: cross-tenant client and endpoint management denied
wrong-Space, missing-scope, expired and revoked access denied
plaintext client, token and webhook secrets absent from list, database export and Space export
private or unsafe webhook destinations rejected
duplicate event enqueue creates one delivery
retry preserves event ID and Idempotency-Key
terminal client and endpoint lifecycle enforced in PostgreSQL
statusBoundary: The local platform-integration slice is implemented. Phase 4 production readiness remains gated by Phase 3 closure and the named LTI pilot.
